/CAL: TO SET MOTION TO WITHDRAW GUILTY PLEA/X: THE PEOPLE WILL AGREE TO AREDUCTION OF PROBATION IN THIS CASE,/X: THE DEFENDANT AND HIS ATTORNEY WILL WAIVE ALL APPELLATE ISSUES,/CTORD: PROBATION IN THIS CASE IS HEREBY REDUCED FROM A PERIOD OF FIVE YEARS TO A PERIOD OF THREE YEARS/PROB MOD/PROBEXT: 02-05-13/CTORD:MATTER OFF CALENDAR FOR THE FOLLOWING REASON: DEFENDANT CONTINUES ONPROBATION    /

/AJW/CH1:ISS:PROB 5 Y:PJ 1 Y/CTS: 2/X:MAY BE SERVED IN ELECTRONIC MONITORIN/DNACOMP/WS/11590/DTC/LF/RX/VF4:200/PC/PSR/BKFEE/PROBFINE/SECFEE/ICNA/COLLECT/X: THE DEFENDANT SHALL PAY A BASE FINE OF $500 PLUS ASSESSMENTS FORA FINEAMOUNT OF $1900,/X: IN LIEU OF PAYMENT OF FINE, DEFENDANT MAY PERFORM COMMUNITY SERVICE AS DETERMINED BY THE COMPREHENSIVE COLLECTIONS UNIT,/CCC:2413961 AND 2431015/OBEY/ACCEP/
